# React Fast Template — Copilot Adapter

<!-- Thin adapter. Source of truth: ai/FACADE.md → ai/BOOTSTRAP.md -->

⚠️ **Read `ai/FACADE.md` FIRST** — it routes you to the right skill for any task.

## Stack

React 19 | TypeScript ~5.9 | Vite 8 | TanStack Router (file-based) | TanStack Query 5 | Zustand 5
React Hook Form 7 + Zod 4 | Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui (Radix + CVA) | Axios | Vitest + RTL | Playwright | Storybook 10
Architecture: **Feature-Sliced Design** enforced by `eslint-plugin-boundaries`

## Critical Rules (always enforced)

| Rule                          | Details                                                                                        |
| ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| NO `console.log`              | Only `console.warn` / `console.error` allowed                                                  |
| NO `any`                      | `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any: error`                                                    |
| NO relative cross-dir imports | Always use `@/` alias — `../../` is banned                                                     |
| Files & folders = kebab-case  | Enforced by `eslint-plugin-check-file`                                                         |
| Features isolated             | A feature MUST NOT import from another feature                                                 |
| Shared layers pure            | `components/`, `hooks/`, `lib/`, `types/`, `utils/` MUST NOT import from `features/` or `app/` |
| Boolean naming                | `is*` / `has*` / `should*` / `can*` / `did*` / `will*` / `are*`                                |
| Components ≤150 lines         | Hard warn — split into smaller components                                                      |
| No nested ternary             | Extract to variables / early returns                                                           |
| Strict equality               | `===` / `!==` (null comparison excepted)                                                       |
| Import order                  | builtin → external → internal → parent/sibling → index → object (alphabetized)                 |
| No cycles                     | `import/no-cycle: error`                                                                       |
| Blank line before `return`    | Enforced                                                                                       |
| `routeTree.gen.ts`            | NEVER edit by hand — generated by TanStack Router plugin                                       |
| Env access via `@/config/env` | Never `import.meta.env.*` directly — Zod-validated at startup                                  |
| Axios via `@/lib/api`         | Response interceptor unwraps `response.data` — don't read `res.data.data`                      |
| Forms = RHF + Zod             | `useForm({ resolver: zodResolver(schema) })` + `*.schema.ts` files                             |
| Queries = key factories       | Colocated `*-keys.ts`; use `queryOptions()` for type-safe reuse                                |
| `cn()` for classes            | From `@/utils/cn` — never string-concat Tailwind classes                                       |
| Commits = Conventional        | `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `refactor`, `test`, `chore`, `deps`, `perf`, `ci`, `build`, `revert`    |

## Imports Cheat Sheet

```ts
import { api } from "@/lib/api"; // Axios instance
import { queryClient } from "@/lib/react-query"; // QueryClient singleton
import { env } from "@/config/env"; // Zod-validated env
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn"; // Tailwind class merger
import { Button } from "@/ui/button"; // shadcn primitive
import { Card } from "@/components/card"; // Shared presentational
// Features: import ONLY inside the same feature or from app/ / routes/
import { useExample } from "@/features/example/hooks/use-example";
```

## Commands

```bash
npm run dev              # Vite dev server on port 3000
npm run build            # tsc -b && vite build → dist/
npm run lint             # ESLint
npm run lint:fix         # ESLint --fix
npm run format           # Prettier
npm test                 # Vitest (watch)
npm test -- --run        # Vitest single run (CI)
npm run test:coverage    # V8 coverage
npx playwright test      # E2E (Chromium / Firefox / WebKit)
npm run storybook        # Storybook dev server on port 6006
```

## Verification (always run before handing back)

```bash
npm run lint && npm run build && npm test -- --run
```

## Navigation

`ai/FACADE.md` → task routing | `ai/BOOTSTRAP.md` → full reference | `ai/README.md` → technical docs
`ai/engine/` → DAG pipeline scenarios | `ai/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` → domain knowledge
`ai/rules/` → enforced rules | `ai/agents/` → specialized subagent personas
